verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He used to walk this earth, with sandals on His feet Many people would gather round, just to hear Him speak With His hands He'd heal the sick and open the eyes that could not see And just to think that life that lives in Him is now a part of me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Now He's walking in my shoes, He's singing with my voice He's reaching out with my hands, helping someone make the right choice He's smiling with my face, He's showing me the way And I'm so glad that I can be a part, He's living in my heart!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: With His voice He'd speak and calm an angry sea Yet He said that one day, we'd do greater things than He He forgave the men that nailed Him to the tree And just to think that His Spirit now lives inside of me
